decisions.rationale: The observation base_record_id 'project_34th-st-sbs-2012' matches an existing registry record with the same id. The source_id '20110314_34th_cac4_slides' is already listed among the record's source_ids. The observation describes the same project: 34th Street Select Bus Service with off-board fare collection, bus lane camera enforcement, offset bus lanes, bus bulbs, and expanded loading zones. Since the observation already resolves to its own base_record_id and the matching registry record is the same, this is 'new' — no different target needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 2011 planned improvements – Off-board fare collection on M34 and M16 – Bus lane camera enforcement • 2012 proposed design – Offset bus lanes – Bus bulbs and sidewalk extensions – Expanded loading zones
